programmes.show_description: Alf's joy at Rita's pending divorce is short lived when he learns she is to live with the new doctor. S3 E1
With Tina Turner, Gerry Rafferty and Justin Hayward. The legendary BAFTA-winning music and comedy show from Thames TV (1979). All in the best possible taste!
Simon goes to help a young American woman who is being overcharged by a taxi driver in Rome - and becomes involved in a kidnapping case with dramatic developments. S1 E2: The Latin Touch
A selection of live performances from TV music shows in the 1960s for a genuine taste of the best of the '60s!

Your favourite music from the 1960s - non-stop.
After Lindbergh's fame, his baby was kidnapped in 1932. Carpenter Hauptmann was executed, but mysteries remain. Narrated by Robert Powell.
Fierce internal feuding between the Abwehr, the Gestapo and the Reich Central Security Office may have contributed to the Nazis' defeat in WW2. E1: German Intelligence in WW2
The Waffen-SS were renowned for their brutality and tenacity, characteristics which made them the subject of numerous Allied war crime investigations. Ep1: Waffen-SS
The mighty Flying Fortress takes to the air as we examine the background and development of one of the most iconic bombers from WWII. Serving with both the USAAF and the RAF. S2 E1
The course of WWII changed dramatically when the USA joined the Allies. In the Pacific, American sea power tackled the German U-Boats. In the East, the Red Army pushed the Germans back to Berlin. E3
Tim Pigott-Smith narrates the story of the Soviet victory over the mighty Japanese Kwangtung Army in the mountains of Manchuria, which is one of the least known of the Second World War.
Examining the history of war tactics. We explore siege warfare, which is almost as old as history itself and can have several aims. S1 E7
The role of naval crafts and aircraft in WW2 with eyewitness accounts about how campaigns were planned and what happened on the day of attack when protection from the enemy was very limited.
We explore the evolution of the main battle tank - charting its progress from the fields of WWI France to the deserts of Iraq - and check out its arch-rival of 'tank killer weapons'. E1: Heavy Metal

Col. Tim Collins reinvestigates one of the most celebrated campaigns of WWII - the war in North Africa - looking at the Siege of Tobruk and the Battle of El Alamein. Ep1: Tobruk - Triumph and Disaster
We look at three different German U-boat wrecks from WWII including UC-66 - the first to be sunk by a plane - and U-480, the world's first stealth sub. Ep1: Assassins of the Deep
Tom meets a rich lady who is looking for her father and agrees to help; meanwhile, Billy starts work as a doctor at a local surgery in Wellesley Street. S2 E6: God & Love & Wellesley Street
Since he can't sell his second hand cars, Arthur decides it might be a good idea to hire them out instead - but Ray has some trouble with the customers. S9 E10: Cars and Pints and Pains
Ross tries to financially support Elizabeth in the wake of Francis's death, but George calls in Ross's debt; meanwhile, Demelza toils loyally to protect all at Nampara. Starring Aidan Turner. S2 E6
Drama series about a cop who wakes up in what seems to be 1973. After a bomb warning, A-Division go on red alert, but it doesn't fit with Sam's understanding of IRA methods. Starring John Simm. S2 E3
Alf Garnett is spurred into action by the arrival of his AIDS leaflet. S3 E2
With David Bowie and Rachel Sweet. The legendary BAFTA-winning music and comedy show from Thames TV (1979). All in the best possible taste!
When a reporter friend of Simon's is murdered by a corrupt union boss, it's up to him to bring him to justice. S1 E3: The Careful Terrorist

Your favourite music from the 1960s - non-stop.
In 1937 the Nazi Hindenburg airship burst into flames. New film raised doubts. Tragic accident or sabotage? Narrated by Robert Powell.
Tank development was dramatic in World War II; we see the emergence of monster tanks from pre-war light tanks, but were the German tanks over-engineered and too vulnerable to breakdown? Ep1: Tanks
How the capture of the Germans' Cipher codebreaking machine permitted one of the greatest campaigns of deception in military history. E2: The Ultra Enigma
The Special Operations Executive nurtured and supported Resistance movements across occupied Europe, the Middle East and the Far East while their lives were constantly under threat. Ep2: S.O.E
The B-24 Liberator more than proved its worth over Europe and the Pacific by patterning the B17 to deliver a blow to the Axis powers in WWII; however, it wasn't simply a bomb delivery system. S2 E2
We hear first-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France. Ep1: Fall of France
Tim Pigott-Smith narrates the story of one of Second World War's most harrowing episodes - the 890-day siege of the Soviet Union's second city Leningrad which was not liberated until January 1944.
Examining the history of war tactics. The use of battle fleets to establish control of the sea has been a key aspect of naval warfare for over 2000 years. S1 E8
A look at London's first 1,000 years includes treasures unearthed by Crossrail, the ruins of Roman Londinium, handwritten messages dating back 2,000 years and the first London Bridge. Ep1
Colonel Tim Collins investigates the brilliant Axis intelligence coup which helped Erwin Rommel's Afrika Korps sweep forward to threaten Cairo. Ep2: Victory and Controversy at El Alamein
The helicopter gunship's future looked in doubt in the first Gulf War of 1991 - now their biggest threat in the 21st century isn't any sort of enemy, but rather cost. E2: Hellfire and Brimstone
Armed with the latest undersea technology and personal testimony, we board two doomed ships to discover what set them on the path to catastrophe. Ep2: Danger Ahead
When Sir Horatio Manners calls in a favour from Jack, Jack pays him back with interest. S2 E7: Whatever Made You Think the War Was Over
Arthur's eyes light up when he discovers that he may be in line to inherit a fortune in Australia. S9 E11: The Great Trilby
Ross and Dwight stand trial for their part in the smuggling as a new tin lode gives Ross renewed hope in Wheal Grace, but it is George who is there for Elizabeth. Starring Aidan Turner. S2 E8
Drama series about a detective who wakes up in what seems to be 1973. Sam and Annie are led into a world of suburban swingers' parties to solve a murder case. Starring John Simm. S2 E4
